Title: PbrMYB21, a novel MYB protein of Pyrus betulaefolia, functions in drought tolerance and modulates polyamine levels by regulating arginine decarboxylase gene

Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Pyridoxal phosphate-dependent group IV decarboxylase family
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Decarboxylates L-arginine to agmatine, supplying precursor flux for putrescine and downstream spermidine/spermine biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Contributes to drought tolerance and mitigation of oxidative damage
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Expressed in leaves; induced by drought and reduced in PbrMYB21-silenced plants
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Higher PbrADC expression is associated with increased polyamine accumulation and improved drought tolerance; reduced PbrADC expression is associated with lower polyamine content and greater drought sensitivity
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. PbrADC transcript abundance decreased when PbrMYB21 was silenced in Pyrus betulaefolia. 2. Its promoter contains a MYB-recognizing cis-element bound by PbrMYB21 in Y1H, transient assay, and EMSA. 3. PbrADC is implicated as a direct target contributing to polyamine accumulation under drought.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; promoter isolation; yeast one-hybrid; transient dual-luciferase assay; EMSA
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The paper focuses on transcriptional regulation of PbrADC by PbrMYB21 rather than direct genetic manipulation of PbrADC itself; tobacco orthologous ADC genes were monitored as downstream readouts in heterologous overexpression lines.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: Transcriptome data mentioned for dehydration-induced MYB discovery; accession NA
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful downstream target within MYB-ADC module for engineering drought tolerance via elevated polyamine biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Native PbrADC promoter; mutated promoter fragment in transient assays

Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: PbrADC; ADC ortholog expression (NtADC1; NtADC2) elevated in tobacco overexpression lines
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activates PbrADC promoter and positively increases ADC transcript abundance, leading to elevated polyamine biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator linking drought response to polyamine accumulation through direct activation of ADC
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Support drought tolerance, likely by reducing ROS damage and improving stress adaptation
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Rapidly induced by dehydration; induced by salt; not notably induced by cold
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Overexpressed in transgenic tobacco under CaMV 35S; silenced in Pyrus betulaefolia by VIGS
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Overexpression increases ADC expression, free polyamine levels, antioxidant enzyme activities, and drought/dehydration tolerance, whereas silencing lowers ADC expression and polyamine levels and increases drought sensitivity
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. PbrMYB21 is a dehydration-inducible R2R3-MYB with nuclear localization and transactivation activity. 2. Overexpression in tobacco enhances dehydration/drought tolerance and increases ADC expression and polyamine accumulation. 3. VIGS in Pyrus betulaefolia reduces ADC expression, polyamine levels, and drought tolerance. 4. PbrMYB21 directly binds the MYB cis-element in the PbrADC promoter and acts as a transcriptional activator.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; transgenic overexpression; VIGS; subcellular localization; yeast transactivation assay; yeast one-hybrid; transient expression assay; EMSA; metabolite profiling by HPLC
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The study primarily establishes a MYB-ADC regulatory module; other stress-responsive genes changed in transgenic lines but direct regulation was not demonstrated.
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: Dehydration transcriptome used to identify PbrMYB21; accession NA
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Promising regulator for engineering drought tolerance and polyamine metabolism in perennial fruit crops or heterologous systems
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: CaMV 35S promoter for overexpression in tobacco; GAL4/UAS system in transient transcriptional activation assay
